info.title: Pharos AI API
info.description:
Public API for Pharos AI — real-time conflict intelligence, geopolitical event tracking, prediction markets, and economic indicators.

All JSON responses use the envelope format `{ ok: true, data }` for success and `{ ok: false, error: { code, message } }` for errors.

Base URL: `https://conflicts.app/api/v1`

tags.name: Actors
tags.description: State and non-state actors involved in conflicts

tags.name: X Posts
tags.description: Field signals — social media posts and statements

tags.name: Map
tags.description: Geospatial map data and narrative stories

tags.name: RSS
tags.description: News feeds, collections, and RSS syndication

get.description: Returns the active conflict ID, available days, status, threat level, and escalation score. Use this on app load to configure the client.
Returns full metadata for a specific conflict including codename, commanders, objectives, and current status.
Returns an array of day snapshots ordered by date. Use `lite=true` for a compact response (day, label, summary, escalation only).

parameters.name: lite
parameters.description: Return compact snapshots (day, dayLabel, summary, escalation only)

get.description: Returns the full snapshot for a specific conflict day including casualties, economic impact, and scenarios.
Returns events for a conflict. Filter by day, severity, type, or verification status. Use `lite=true` for compact responses without sources and actor responses.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

get.description: Returns the full event including sources and actor responses.
Returns all actors in a conflict with their current stance, activity level, and day snapshots. Pass `day` to overlay a specific day's snapshot data.
Returns full actor data with day snapshots, recent actions, and linked events.
Returns the recent actions timeline for a specific actor.
Returns X posts (tweets), news articles, and official statements related to a conflict. Filter by day, significance, account type, or Pharos-annotated posts only.

parameters.name: pharosOnly
parameters.description: Only return posts with Pharos analyst annotations

get.summary: Get posts linked to an actor
get.description: Returns all field signals associated with a specific actor.

get.summary: Get posts linked to an event
get.description: Returns all field signals associated with a specific intelligence event.
Returns all geospatial features for a conflict: strike arcs, missile tracks, targets, military assets, threat zones, heat points, and actor metadata. Optionally filter by dataset type.

parameters.name: datasets
parameters.description: Comma-separated MapFeatureType values to filter by (e.g. `STRIKE_ARC,TARGET`)

get.description: Returns curated narrative stories that highlight specific map features with a camera viewstate, timeline events, and key facts.
Returns all configured RSS feed sources with their perspective, country, tier, and tags.
Returns conflict-organized feed collections, each containing channels grouped by editorial perspective.
Returns an RSS 2.0 XML feed of intelligence events. Subscribe to this feed in any RSS reader for real-time event updates.
Returns an RSS 2.0 XML feed of daily conflict briefings.
Fetches and parses items from one or more RSS feeds by their IDs. Returns cached results when available.

post.description: Fetches and caches items from one or more RSS feeds by ID. If no IDs are provided, all configured feeds are prefetched.

ids.description: Optional list of feed IDs to prefetch

get.description: Returns tracked economic indexes (oil, gold, equities, etc.) with their ticker symbols, categories, and conflict relevance tiers.
Fetches a remote image over HTTP(S), blocks private hosts, and returns the binary response with caching headers.

413.description: Upstream image exceeds max allowed size

get.description: Returns current price, change, and intraday chart data for the specified ticker symbols via Yahoo Finance.
Returns the categorization groups used to organize prediction markets (e.g. Military Escalation, Diplomatic, Nuclear).
Returns all tracked prediction markets from Polymarket with current prices, volume, and sub-markets.

get.summary: Get price history for a prediction token
get.description: Returns time-series price history for a specific prediction market token.

parameters.name: tokenId
parameters.description: YES token ID from a prediction market

get.summary: Get chart data for a prediction market
get.description: Returns time-series chart data for a prediction market by condition ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Condition ID of the prediction market

get.description: Returns World Bank development indicators for specified countries: military spending, GDP %, armed forces, inflation, GDP growth, refugee population, and Gini coefficient.

BadRequest.description: Bad request — missing or invalid parameters

coordinates.description: Array of [longitude, latitude] pairs forming the zone polygon
